prompt: I paid for a guest speaker's hotel for our R-Ladies event out of pocket. How do I get reimbursed by R-Ladies?
assertions: Says to email finance@rladies.org BEFORE spending / that reimbursement needs pre-approval
Says to complete the Expense Reimbursement form
Says US residents get a check and those outside the US complete a Wire Form (IBAN) for a wire transfer
Says to combine the form and a receipt for every item into one PDF
States the PDF naming convention YYYYMMDD_SURNAMENAME.pdf
Notes requests are collated/submitted monthly (last week of the month)
